title: Raghav Chadha news LIVE updates: AAP MP takes ‘Sheesh Mahal 2’ dig at Kejriwal; party's ‘Pinterest’ pictures counter
description: Raghav Chadha news LIVE updates: AAP will approach Vice President and Rajya Sabha Chairman CP Radhakrishnan, seeking the disqualification of seven of its MPs who announced a merger with BJP.
